name: Hellene 22" Wall Sconce - SCN4111 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the captivating HELLENE 22 inch brass iron wall sconce. Crafted with a sleek metal body and shade, this stunning fixture combines functionality with artistic elegance. Its brass finish adds a touch of sophistication to any room, seamlessly blending with various decor styles. Whether you are accentuating a cozy corner or highlighting a grand hallway, the HELLENE sconce offers versatile placement opportunities. The durable construction ensures reliable performance, making it a stylish choice for enhancing your ambient lighting. Elevate your home decor with the remarkable design of the HELLENE wall sconce, a perfect addition to modern and classic spaces alike. Add character and warmth to your interior with this elegant lighting solution.
